description: LLM pretraining quality speedrun: minimize validation bits-per-byte (val_bpb) on the PleIAs SYNTH corpus. Train a small language model from scratch within a fixed 20-minute wall-clock budget and a hard <100M trainable parameter constraint. The corpus is 500 parquet shards, ~155K rows each, ~32B tokens total. Each row has columns: synth_id, language, exercise, query, synthetic_reasoning, synthetic_answer, words. ~80% English. For training text, concatenate the 'synthetic_answer' (and optionally 'query') columns.
target: Minimize val_bpb (validation bits-per-byte). Lower is better. Model must have <100M trainable parameters and training must complete within 20 minutes wall-clock.
